entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The target crop for genetic improvement, scientifically known as Cajanus cajan Millsp

entities.name: GENETIC AND GENOMIC INFORMATION
entities.description: The available biological data regarding the genetic makeup of pigeonpea

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The collection of genetic resources available in various gene pools for pigeonpea

entities.name: GENE POOLS
entities.description: Categories of genetic resources including primary, secondary, tertiary, and quaternary pools

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist attack by pests, sourced from beyond the primary gene pool

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist diseases, sourced from beyond the primary gene pool

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that negatively impact plant growth

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand abiotic stresses, sourced from beyond the primary gene pool

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILE SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems (CMS) used to facilitate hybrid production and yield improvement

entities.name: YIELD IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The increase in agricultural productivity of pigeonpea

entities.name: HOMOZYGOUS PIGEONPEA LINES
entities.description: Novel genetic lines characterized by homozygous genotypes

entities.name: CROSSABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of different pigeonpea gene pools to be crossed successfully

entities.name: WIDE CROSSING TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The technological approach used to improve pigeonpea by crossing distant genetic sources
